title: Accounts Payable Invoices
description: A request for payment for goods sold, services provided or expenses incurred, containing individual prices, additional charges, payment terms and account information

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the accounts payable invoice.

vendor.title: Vendor
vendor.description: The vendor associated with the invoice.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Vendor.

vendorAddress.title: Vendor Address
vendorAddress.description: The vendor address to be used for this invoice (defaults to the vendors primary address).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Vendor Address.

referenceNumber.title: Reference Number
referenceNumber.description: The purchase order number, encumbrance number, or other reference number associated with the invoice.

invoiceNumber.title: Invoice Number
invoiceNumber.description: A system-generated number associated with the invoice.

vendorInvoiceNumber.title: Vendor Invoice Number
vendorInvoiceNumber.description: The invoice number specified by the vendor.

transactionDate.title: Transaction Date
transactionDate.description: The transaction date for the invoice. This will be the date used when entering the transactions into the general ledger.

vendorInvoiceDate.title: Vendor Invoice Date
vendorInvoiceDate.description: The invoice date as specified by the vendor.

voidDate.title: Void Date
voidDate.description: The date on which the invoice was voided, if applicable.

processState.title: Process State
processState.description: The current state of the processing of the invoice.

paymentStatus.title: Paymant Status
paymentStatus.description: An indicator specifying if payment for the invoice is on hold.

vendorBilledAmount.title: Vendor Billed Amount
vendorBilledAmount.description: The billed amount as specified by the vendor.

invoiceDiscountAmount.title: Invoice Discount Amount
invoiceDiscountAmount.description: The discount applied to the overall invoice.

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.description: The taxes associated with the invoice.

taxCode.title: Tax Code
taxCode.description: A tax code applicable to the invoice.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Tax Code.

vendorAmount.title: Vendor Amount
vendorAmount.description: The amount of taxes for the tax code as specified by the vendor.

invoiceType.title: Invoice Type
invoiceType.description: An indicator specifying if the invoice is a standard or a credit invoice.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Information concerning the payment of the invoice.

source.title: Source
source.description: The source account for the payment of the invoice.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Source.

paymentDueOn.title: Payment Due On
paymentDueOn.description: The date the invoice payment is due.

directDepositOverride.title: Direct Deposit Override
directDepositOverride.description: An indication if direct deposit should not be used for the invoice or if the vendor default for direct deposit should be used.

paymentTerms.title: Payment Terms
paymentTerms.description: The vendor payment terms and conditions that are applicable to this invoice.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Payment Terms.

invoiceComment.title: Invoice Comment
invoiceComment.description: Comments on the invoice as a whole.

oneOf.title: United States of America
oneOf.description: Governmental reporting for the United States of America

code.title: Code
code.description: The country code of the United States of America

transactionType.title: Transaction Type
transactionType.description: The transaction type associated with the invoice. This information is required for international ACH transactions for NACHA.

submittedBy.title: Submitted By
submittedBy.description: The person who made the submit request for the invoice.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Submitted By.

lineItems.title: Line Items
lineItems.description: The individual line items associated with an invoice.

referenceDocument.title: Reference Document
referenceDocument.description: The originating document associated with the line item, which indicates what encumbrance needs to be relieved.

oneOf.title: Purchase Order
oneOf.description: The originating purchase order associated with the line item.

purchaseOrder.title: Purchase Order
purchaseOrder.description: The originating purchase order associated with the line item.

oneOf.title: Blanket Purchase Order
oneOf.description: The originating blanket purchase order associated with the line item.

blanketPurchaseOrder.title: Blanket Purchase Order
blanketPurchaseOrder.description: The originating blanket purchase order associated with the line item.

oneOf.title: Recurring Voucher
oneOf.description: The originating recurring voucher associated with the line item.

recurringVoucher.title: Recurring Voucher
recurringVoucher.description: The originating recurring voucher associated with the line item.

oneOf.title: Purchasing Arrangement
oneOf.description: The originating purchasing arrangement associated with the line item.

purchasingArrangement.title: Purchasing Arrangement
purchasingArrangement.description: The originating purchasing arrangement associated with the line item.

referenceDocumentLineItemNumber.title: Reference Document Line Item Number
referenceDocumentLineItemNumber.description: The reference document line item number associated with the invoice.

lineItemNumber.title: Line Item Number
lineItemNumber.description: A system generated number to identify the line item.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the line item.

commodityCode.title: Commodity Code
commodityCode.description: The commodity specified by the line item.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Commodity Code.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: The number of units specified for the line item.

vendorBilledQuantity.title: Vendor Billed Quantity
vendorBilledQuantity.description: The number of units for the line item as specified by the vendor.

unitOfMeasure.title: Unit of Measure
unitOfMeasure.description: The unit of measure used for the line item.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Unit of Measure.

unitPrice.title: Unit Price
unitPrice.description: The price per unit for the commodity specified for the line item.

vendorBilledUnitPrice.title: Vendor Billed Unit Price
vendorBilledUnitPrice.description: The price per unit for the commodity specified for the line item as specified by the vendor.

additionalAmount.title: Additional Amount
additionalAmount.description: Additional charges/discounts applied to the line item (e.g. freight)

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.description: The taxes that are applicable to the line item if different from the invoice.

taxCode.title: Tax Code
taxCode.description: A tax code that applies to the line item.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Tax Code.

vendorAmount.title: Vendor Amount
vendorAmount.description: The amount of taxes for the line item based on the tax code as specified by the vendor.

discount.title: Discount
discount.description: The discount applied to the line item (e.g. trade/volume discounts).

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: The amount of the discount for the line item, if specified.

percent.title: Percent
percent.description: The discount percentage applied to the line item, if specified.

paymentStatus.title: Payment Status
paymentStatus.description: An indication if payment for the the line item is on hold.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: Additional comment associated with the line Item

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the line item (open, closed).

accountDetails.title: Account Details
accountDetails.description: The detail account information for the line item.

sequenceNumber.title: Sequence Number
sequenceNumber.description: The sequence number associated with the account detail item.

accountingString.title: Accounting String
accountingString.description: The accounting string associated with the account detail item.

allocation.title: Allocation
allocation.description: The allocation of line item values to the accounting string.

allocated.title: Allocated
allocated.description: The portion (or percentage) of the line item amount or quantity allocated to the accounting string. (One of amount, quantity or percent must be specified)

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: The amount allocated to the accounting string.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: The quantity allocated to the accounting string.

percentage.title: Percentage
percentage.description: The percentage of the line item amount allocated to the accounting string.

taxAmount.title: Tax Amount
taxAmount.description: The tax amount associated with the accounting string - overrides the distributed line amounts, if specified.

additionalAmount.title: Additional Amount
additionalAmount.description: Additional charges applied to the accounting string (e.g. freight) - overrides the distributed line item amounts, if specified.

discountAmount.title: Discount Amount
discountAmount.description: The discount amount associated with the accounting string - overrides the distributed line amounts, if specified.

source.title: Source
source.description: The source account for the payment to the accounting string if different from the source specified for the invoice.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Source.

budgetCheck.title: Budget Check
budgetCheck.description: An indication if budget checking should be enforced or overridden.

submittedBy.title: Submitted By
submittedBy.description: The person who made the submit request for the line item.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Submitted By.
